contract.title: Dashboard Overview
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for at-a-glance dashboards and next-best-action surfaces.
contract.content_frame: Use a summary-first page frame with a small number of dense status regions.
contract.data_view: Prefer compact grouped summaries before large raw tables.
contract.form_action: Keep primary actions visible and low-risk from the landing view.

reference_set.title: Dashboard Pattern References
reference_set.summary: Example sources this scaffold can grow into without coupling to a private product.

links.label: Operations summary
links.summary: Primary state, blockers, and next actions.

contract.title: List Detail Workspace
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for browse-select-inspect flows.
contract.content_frame: Keep the collection visible while a detail drawer or side panel stays in context.
contract.data_view: Support search, filtering, and sorting without hiding the selected state.
contract.form_action: Move edits into drawers, forms, or modal actions instead of inline list churn.

reference_set.title: List Detail References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for record browsers and workbenches.

contract.title: Workflow Review
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for guided review and approval sequences.
contract.content_frame: Show one current step clearly while preserving stage awareness.
contract.data_view: Attach evidence and notes near the active step instead of scattering them.
contract.form_action: Require explicit confirmation states for consequential actions.

reference_set.title: Workflow References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for checklists, gates, and review flows.

links.label: Execute
links.summary: Current safe step and evidence capture.

contract.title: Live Monitor
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for live data, freshness, and safe degraded states.
contract.content_frame: Keep current state, trend context, and degraded-state messaging visible together.
contract.data_view: Attach freshness and timestamp context directly to live values.
contract.form_action: Disable unsafe controls unless the starter confirms a valid live state.

reference_set.title: Live Monitor References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for live status and monitored environments.

links.label: Current readings
links.summary: Compact latest values and freshness markers.

contract.title: Reference Library
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for searchable references, controlled docs, and supporting materials.
contract.content_frame: Keep the search list and selected preview in one stable browsing context.
contract.data_view: Include revision, source, and document-state metadata directly in results.
contract.form_action: Favor read-first flows with explicit actions for review, replace, or archive.

reference_set.title: Reference Library References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for knowledge and document surfaces.

links.label: Preview
links.summary: Current excerpt, revision, and source context.

contract.title: Results Report
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for summary, evidence, and export-oriented result pages.

statuses.label: Export Pending
statuses.description: A downstream export is still required

contract.content_frame: Present summary findings first, then evidence and exportable detail.
contract.data_view: Keep source context and timestamps attached to result rows.
contract.form_action: Require explicit review states before exporting or publishing a result.

reference_set.title: Results References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for summary and evidence pages.

contract.title: Settings Workspace
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for settings, defaults, and review-before-save pages.
contract.content_frame: Group related inputs into clear sections with visible review state.
contract.data_view: Expose defaults and change previews close to the form.
contract.form_action: Prefer explicit review and rollback hints before confirmed save.

reference_set.title: Settings References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for admin and configuration surfaces.
